name: l4_security_audit_and_fix
description: L4: Multi-turn - audit for security issues, fix the critical one, add a test
llm_scorer_instruction: Evaluate whether the agent identified real security vulnerabilities (SQL injection, token expiry bypass), prioritized correctly, produced a correct fix, and wrote a meaningful test. Penalize if the agent missed the SQL injection or introduced new issues.

turns.message: Perform a security audit of this Express API. Read all source files and identify every security vulnerability. For each, state the file, the vulnerability type, and the severity (critical/high/medium/low).
Fix the most critical security vulnerability you found. Make the minimal change needed.
Add a test that verifies the vulnerability is fixed. Put it in the tests/ directory.
